comments:
TreeView State — Runtime state management for the tree view.

## Design Philosophy

State is pure data describing the tree at a point in time.
State transitions are pure functions: State -> Msg -> State.
The runtime renders state to DOM; no mutation here.

## State Components

- Expanded node set (which nodes are expanded)
- Selected node set (which nodes are selected)
- Checked node map (checkbox states)
- Focus state (keyboard navigation)
- Drag state (drag and drop)
- Search state (filter query)
- Loading state (lazy-loaded nodes)

## Dependencies

- TreeView.Types (NodeId, CheckState, DropPosition, SelectionMode)

declarations.comments:
Set of expanded node IDs

Tracks which nodes have their children visible.
declarations.title: ExpandedState

declarations.comments: Check if a node is expanded
declarations.title: isExpanded

declarations.comments: Expand all nodes (given a list of all node IDs)
declarations.title: expandAll

declarations.comments:
Set of selected node IDs

Tracks which nodes are currently selected.
In SingleSelect mode, only one node can be selected.
declarations.title: SelectedState

declarations.comments: Check if a node is selected
declarations.title: isSelected

declarations.comments: Select all nodes (given a list of all node IDs)
declarations.title: selectAll

declarations.comments: Get all selected node IDs as array
declarations.title: selectedNodes

declarations.comments:
Map of node IDs to check states

For checkable trees. Nodes not in the map are Unchecked.
declarations.title: CheckedState

declarations.comments: Get a node's check state (defaults to Unchecked)
declarations.title: getCheckState

declarations.comments: Get all checked node IDs as array (only fully checked, not indeterminate)
declarations.title: checkedNodes

declarations.comments:
Current keyboard focus state

Tracks which node has keyboard focus for navigation.
declarations.title: FocusState

declarations.comments: Set focus to a specific node
declarations.title: focusOn

declarations.comments: Check if any node has focus
declarations.title: hasFocus

declarations.comments:
Drag and drop state

Tracks active drag operations.
declarations.title: DragState

declarations.comments:
Search/filter state

Tracks the current search query for filtering visible nodes.
declarations.title: SearchState

declarations.comments: Check if there's an active search query
declarations.title: hasSearchQuery

declarations.comments:
Set of nodes currently loading children

For lazy-loaded trees, tracks which nodes are fetching children.
declarations.title: LoadingState

declarations.comments: Check if a node is loading
declarations.title: isLoading

declarations.comments: Clear loading state for a node
declarations.title: clearLoading

declarations.comments:
State for inline label editing

Tracks which node is being edited and the current edit buffer.
The buffer holds the in-progress text, separate from the node's actual label.
declarations.title: EditState

declarations.comments:
Begin editing a node

Stores the original value so it can be restored on cancel.
declarations.title: beginEditState

declarations.comments: Get the node being edited (if any)
declarations.title: getEditingNode

declarations.comments: Get the current edit buffer text
declarations.title: getEditBuffer

declarations.comments: Check if any node is being edited
declarations.title: isEditing

declarations.comments: Check if a specific node is being edited
declarations.title: isEditingNode

declarations.comments: Clear the edit state (cancel or confirm)
declarations.title: clearEditState

declarations.comments:
State for mouse hover tracking

Tracks which node the mouse is currently over.
Used for hover effects and action button visibility.
declarations.title: HoverState

declarations.comments: Get the currently hovered node (if any)
declarations.title: getHoveredNode

declarations.comments: Check if any node is being hovered
declarations.title: isHovering

declarations.comments: Check if a specific node is being hovered
declarations.title: isHoveringNode

declarations.comments:
Complete tree view runtime state

This compound aggregates all state needed to render the tree.
declarations.title: TreeViewState

name: Hydrogen.Element.Compound.TreeView.State
